column1: # Fork footprint budget (see CLAUDE.md "Downstream Fork Strategy").
# Every upstream-owned file this fork modifies must be listed here with the
# maximum allowed diff vs the upstream merge-base, as:
# scripts/check-fork-footprint.sh (CI: fork-footprint.yml) fails any PR that
# modifies an undeclared upstream file or exceeds a budget.
# Raising a number here is allowed but must be a conscious, reviewed change —
# prefer moving code into a fork-owned module instead (keeps upstream merges
# clean). Deletions in schema.prisma are budgeted at 0 on purpose: fork fields
# must stay purely additive, and `prisma format` re-alignment must never be
